tasks.title: Add validate_workplan_preflight() to hex-agent/src/workplan_executor.rs that checks: (1) all task files exist or parent dirs exist, (2) evidence commands are valid shell, (3) strategy_hint is supported, (4) model is available
Call validate_workplan_preflight() at start of execute_workplan() and fail fast with clear error if validation fails

title: Add preflight validation to workplan executor
